title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXVIII. Songs.
content:
[Song of a little boy while passing his hour of solitude in a corn-field.]

        Awa' birds, away!
        Take a little, and leave a little,
        And do not come again;
        For if you do,
        I will shoot you through,
        And there is an end of you.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXVIII. Songs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
